name: RetinSight GA Monitor
description: Automated geographic atrophy lesion detection and area measurement from OCT
cost_note: Internal Topcon model, no licensing cost

name: RetinSight Fluid Monitor
description: Automated retinal fluid detection and quantification from OCT
cost_note: Internal Topcon model, no licensing cost

name: RETFound
description: Foundation model for retinal image analysis; pretrained on large-scale retinal imaging data
cost_note: Open-source model, already integrated with iDHEA feature extraction pipeline

name: Toku CLAiR
description: AI-based cardiovascular risk assessment from retinal images
cost_note: Topcon-owned after acquisition; enriches demographic/systemic risk profiles
